meta.name: Shipment Management System — UI Design System
meta.intent: High-level creative direction and component vocabulary so AI and engineers can replicate a modern, light enterprise dashboard: soft UI, teal accent, airy whitespace, and calm semantic status colors.

screens: Quotation / shipment detail — card-led two-column layout with charge summary and donut visualization
Quotes list — tabbed table view with pill search, filters, and primary CTA
Shipment / quote workspace — three-column shell with sidebar, main, and right rail

creative_direction.personality: Calm, trustworthy, operational clarity over decoration. Feels like a polished internal tool or B2B SaaS dashboard.
creative_direction.visual_style: Soft UI / glassmorphism-lite without heavy blur: white surfaces on cool gray canvas, subtle elevation, rounded geometry, thin outline icons, restrained color.
creative_direction.information_design: Strong hierarchy: IDs and money read largest; labels are smaller and cooler; metadata is smallest and most muted. Prefer scanning patterns: F-pattern in forms, Z-pattern in headers.
creative_direction.density: Comfortable, not compact. Default to generous padding; tighten only inside dense tables.
creative_direction.photography_and_illustration: None by default. Use simple charts (donut) and avatars only where they aid recognition.

design_principles.name: Clarity first
design_principles.guidance: High contrast for primary text on white; never rely on color alone for meaning—pair status hue with label text.

design_principles.name: One accent discipline
design_principles.guidance: Teal/cyan is the sole brand accent for interactive emphasis, selection, and primary actions. Charts may use a small controlled palette.

design_principles.name: Quiet structure
design_principles.guidance: Use whitespace and light dividers before borders. Shadows are soft and rare; borders are 1px hairlines.

design_principles.name: Consistent geometry
design_principles.guidance: Radii ladder: small controls 6–8px, cards 12–16px, pills/full-round search 9999px.

design_principles.name: Predictable interaction
design_principles.guidance: Selected rows and active nav share the same language: pale tint + left accent bar + teal icon/text.

app_shell.pattern: Fixed left sidebar, fixed top bar, scrollable main content on a tinted page background.

sidebar.content: Logo lockup at top; vertical nav stack; generous vertical rhythm between groups

top_bar.content: Global pill search (dominant), secondary utilities (locale/currency, notifications), user menu/avatar cluster aligned end
top_bar.alignment: Start: search; End: utilities; vertical center all controls

main_canvas.max_content_width: fluid with comfortable side padding; avoid ultra-wide single columns without a max-width reader rail

detail_page.description: Primary content ~60–70% width; supporting rail ~25–35%. On small screens stack: summary → details → actions.

list_page.description: Single primary card containing toolbar (tabs, search, filters, CTA) and table; pagination docked bottom inside card.

data_viz.guidance: Keep chart colors vivid but professional; never compete with brand teal used for UI chrome.

font_family.fallback_stack: Use a geometric neo-grotesk with excellent tabular figures for currency tables.

display_id.usage: Shipment or quotation identifiers in page hero.

page_title.usage: Screen titles such as Quotes List.

section_title.usage: Card headers like Shipment Details, Charge Summary.

body_strong.usage: Primary row identifiers (customer name, quote id).

label.transform: uppercase optional; if uppercase, increase tracking slightly
label.usage: Form field labels, table column headers.

caption.usage: Updated at, helper text, secondary emails under names.

typography.numeric_alignment: Right-align currency and counts in tables and summaries; keep labels left-aligned.

elevation.guidance: Elevation signals layering (cards over canvas, menus over cards), not decoration.

iconography.style: Outline / linear, 1.5–2px stroke, rounded caps where available.
iconography.library_hint: Lucide or similar; match stroke weight across sidebar, toolbar, and buttons.

motion.philosophy: Barely perceptible: fast fades and 150–200ms ease-out on hovers; no playful bounce.
motion.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion; swap motion for instant color/border changes.

sidebar_nav_item.structure: Icon + label, left aligned; optional badge at trailing edge.

active.leading_accent: 4px wide vertical bar in brand.primary flush to left edge of item

sidebar_nav_item.hit_area: Minimum 40px height per item; 12–16px horizontal padding inside sidebar.

focus.shadow: subtle outer glow using focus.ring color at low alpha

card.border: 1px solid border.subtle optional; prefer border when shadow is omitted

header.layout: Title left; primary actions right in a horizontal cluster with 8–12px gaps
header.divider: 1px hairline border.subtle below header when body scrolls independently

tabs.style: Pill segmented control for primary modes (e.g., All / Mine / Pending).

active.badge: small circular or pill counter on tab in contrasting subtle tint

tabs.spacing: 8px between tabs; container padding 4–6px internal for segmented feel

button_primary.focus: focus ring as defined in color.focus

button_secondary.style: ghost or subtle gray fill for low-emphasis actions

button_outline.usage: Accept / Reply style constructive secondary emphasis

select_and_menus.trigger: Compact control with chevron; align dropdown to trigger width or slightly wider for readability.

badge_tag.colors: map to color.status.* backgrounds with matching text
badge_tag.border: usually none; optional 1px translucent border for contrast on white

avatar.border: 1px white when overlapping tinted row backgrounds

table.container: Inside card; edge-to-edge rows with horizontal padding on header cells matching card padding.

row_selected.leading_accent: 3–4px brand.primary vertical bar at row start (align with sidebar active language)

pagination.layout: Centered or end-aligned under table with 8px gaps
pagination.active_page: small circular background brand.selection_tint with brand.primary text

toolbar.composition: Left cluster: secondary search scoped to view; middle: filter chips/dropdowns; right: primary CTA
toolbar.spacing: 12–16px between clusters; wrap gracefully on narrow widths maintaining CTA visibility

stat_block_and_key_value.columns: Use two-column key/value grids inside cards; align values to baseline; keep label width consistent to avoid ragged scanning

charge_summary_list.pattern: Vertical list of line items with hairline separators; labels left, amounts right-aligned in tabular figures; section subtotals in semibold.

donut_chart.stroke: medium–thick segment stroke; hollow center shows large total in display numeric style
donut_chart.legend: Small color swatches with caption typography to the side or below

empty_state.layout: Centered in card with illustration optional; title in section_title; body in body text; primary action button

page_hero.alignment: Start aligned; keep badge cluster tight with 8px gaps

filter_chips.style: Subtle filled pills using surface.subtle with text.secondary; active chip uses selection_tint + primary text

accessibility.contrast: Maintain WCAG AA for normal text on white; status pills may use darker text on pastel fills as shown.
accessibility.focus: Always visible keyboard focus on interactive controls; do not remove outlines without replacement rings.
accessibility.targets: Minimum 40x40px hit targets for nav and icon buttons on touch breakpoints.

ai_replication_guide.step_1: Set global canvas background to surface.canvas; keep header/sidebar white; use brand.primary only for interactive emphasis.
ai_replication_guide.step_2: Establish typography scale with Inter; enforce tabular nums for financial columns.
ai_replication_guide.step_3: Build cards with lg radius + soft shadow; separate sections with whitespace before adding borders.
ai_replication_guide.step_4: Mirror selection language: pale mint tint + left vertical bar + teal icon/text across sidebar, table rows, and tabs.
ai_replication_guide.step_5: Use restrained status palette from color.status; pair hue + text label.
anti_patterns: Heavy drop shadows or skeuomorphic gloss
Multiple competing accent colors outside data viz
Low-contrast gray text for primary actions or critical numbers
